title: waltheria americana var. indica
intro: Waltheria americana var. indica, also known as Indian walnut or Java jute, is a plant species used in traditional medicine. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating skin problems. The herbal preparations of Waltheria americana var. indica typically involve making a decoction from the roots, which can be consumed as a tea or used as a topical application for its medicinal effects.
